title: Moroccan Chicken Tagine
description: A traditional North African stew made with chicken, spices, and dried fruits, cooked to perfection in a clay pot.

ingredients.name: tagine
ingredients.notes: Tradition clay cooking pot or Dutch oven

instructions: Heat oil in the tagine or Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add chicken and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add Moroccan spice blend, piquant, and perfumed spices. Cook for 1 minute.
Add dried apricots, chicken broth, and bring to a boil.
Cover the pot and transfer to the oven. Cook at 300°F (150°C) for 30 minutes.
Remove the pot from the oven and let it rest for 10 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs, if desired.
